# Rajeshwar Marriage Hall

> Affordable wedding and event venue in Bihta, Bihar — hosting shaadi, reception, sagai, and birthday celebrations with AC hall, on-site parking, in-house catering, decoration, and sound system.

Located at Bishunpura South Side, Near Bajrangbali Mandir, Bihta, Bihar. Contact Pintu Kumar Singh at +91 62079 28461 (call/WhatsApp).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the venue, facilities, events hosted, services, gallery, testimonials, FAQs, and contact details.
